---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ankitkuamar001-dev
---

## 💡 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## 🎯 Problem It Solves
What problem does this feature address? What is the use case?

## 🔧 Proposed Solution
How would you implement this? What should it look like?

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
What other approaches did you consider and why did you discard them?

## 📋 Additional Context
Any other relevant information, screenshots, or references.
